# Revisit - Student Life Manager App

Revisit is a free Android application designed for students to track attendance, manage tasks and reminders, build weekly timetables, use a monthly calendar, and receive AI-powered personalized study plans. 

## Features
- **Attendance Tracker**: Log presents/absents and track 75% requirements.
- **Tasks & Reminders**: To-do list with deadlines and priority ranking.
- **Routines**: Weekly timetables and dynamic class scheduling.
- **AI Study Planner**: Unlimited AI access in Premium Beta to assist with curriculum pacing and exam prep.
- **Free Version**: Includes ads and all basic tracking features.
- **Premium Beta Version (₹99 until launch)**: Ad-free experience with unlimited AI feature usage.

## Links
- Official Website: https://revisitstudentmanager.vercel.app
- Download Page: https://revisitstudentmanager.vercel.app/download
- Pricing: https://revisitstudentmanager.vercel.app/pricing
